$comment: Declares the licensing status of ambient.mp3. The license-gate test (tests/audio-license.spec.ts) FAILS while cleared=false, so an unlicensed track cannot ship silently. This is now a CC0 public-domain-dedicated recording, so cleared=true is honest.
source: Frédéric Chopin — Nocturne in F minor, Op. 55 No. 1, performed by Luke Faulkner (via Musopen). Recording from Wikimedia Commons: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Chopin_-_Nocturne-op-55-no-1.ogg — transcoded from the source .ogg to 192 kbps MP3, audio otherwise unaltered.
license: CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain Dedication). The recording (the performance) is dedicated to the public domain; the composition is public domain (Chopin d. 1849). No rights reserved, no attribution required.
